providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B GGUF auto prompt
args: Transcribe the audio. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Auto-language baseline for the broader multilingual smoke corpus.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B GGUF forced sample language
args: The audio language is {language}. Transcribe the speech in {language}. Do not translate. If there is no speech, return an empty transcript. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Tests whether explicit language prompting generalizes beyond the earlier Hindi fixture, including a no-speech guard.

providers.label: faster-whisper large-v3-turbo forced sample language
providers.notes: Control baseline using the same sample language metadata as the forced Qwen prompt, with VAD enabled for the silence fixture.
